intro.zh: 正在寻找电机控制算法 / 域控制器开发 / VCU控制策略方向的工作机会，欢迎联系交流。
intro.en: Open to roles in motor control algorithms, domain controller development, and VCU control strategies — feel free to reach out.

description.zh: 寻求电机控制算法、域控制器开发、VCU控制策略方向的岗位。
description.en: Looking for positions in motor control algorithms, domain controller development, and VCU control strategies.
